message:
Implement MVCC epoch-based reclamation, WAL native commit pipeline, and VDBE engine extensions

- Expand epoch-based reclamation (EBR) in fsqlite-mvcc with hazard pointer integration,
  deferred drop queues, and configurable epoch advancement thresholds for safe concurrent
  memory reclamation without stop-the-world pauses
- Extend deterministic rebase in MVCC with conflict detection matrix, write-set intersection
  analysis, and serializable snapshot isolation validation
- Add garbage collection improvements with generational collection tiers and adaptive
  collection scheduling based on write amplification metrics
- Implement WAL native commit pipeline with group commit batching, fsync coalescing,
  and commit slot reservation for high-throughput concurrent writers
- Add WAL metrics subsystem with per-checkpoint timing histograms, page cache hit ratios,
  WAL growth rate tracking, and I/O bandwidth utilization counters
- Extend VDBE engine with new opcode implementations for aggregate functions, window
  frame processing, and coroutine-based subquery execution
- Add observability module with structured tracing spans, query plan visualization,
  and runtime statistics collection for diagnostic dashboards
- Expand fsqlite-func with additional scalar function implementations
- Update Cargo.lock with new workspace dependency versions
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
